blockReason: Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (best score: 90). Defects: The role and country emphasis could be stronger for immediate attention on smaller mobile displays; The blue banner for interview dates slightly reduces headline clarity due to the DOM separation; The QR code looks somewhat separate, integration could be improved visually; The email contact button's color contrast with dark background is low, limiting readability.; Text in the open positions list has alternating row backgrounds that are very subtle and may be hard to distinguish on mobile.; The small green text for numbering in the open positions is of low contrast and may be less legible.; Imagery is low impact and not candidate attracting, though acceptable for structured professional archetype
